ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date the company went public */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Exchange's website */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the exchange */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the exchange was founded */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intraday_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intraday data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous close */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous close */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total value of trades during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intraday_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the day */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price */,
  "post_market_price" REAL /* Post-market price */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous close */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change from the previous close */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the day */,
  "trading_value" REAL /* Total value of trades during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the access (e.g., web, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES intraday_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price drop, volume spike) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "triggered_by" TEXT /* User or system that triggered the alert */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the predictive model used */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value (e.g., future price, volume) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the prediction */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data generated by the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used for training the model */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Data used for testing the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date_range" TEXT /* Date range of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend analysis (e.g., AI, manual) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the trend */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the trend (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trends_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)
